nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: GitGuardian posts here. Copy the Production URL shown by n8n and paste it into GitGuardian -> Settings -> Alerting -> Custom Webhook.

nodes.name: Format message
nodes.notes: Defensive: unwraps either { body: {...} } or the incident object directly, since the payload shape depends on event type.

nodes.name: Send to Telegram
nodes.notes: Edit chatId after import: paste the numeric chat ID from https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates (result[0].message.chat.id). Credential is the 'Telegram API' type holding only the bot token.
